description: A competition rocket at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/high_drift_rocket.ork has a 36-inch (0.9144m) main parachute causing excessive lateral wind drift and a slow descent in a 6.0 m/s crosswind. Modify the parachute by adding a spill hole to achieve a ground hit velocity between 5.0 m/s and 5.5 m/s. Do not change the parachute's outer diameter, the simulation wind speed, or the rocket's mass. Save the modified design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/spill_hole_optimized.ork and write a Drift Reduction Report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/drift_report.txt containing the final ground hit velocity and the final simulated drift distance.
